label: Prenumerationer — Paddle
summary: Recurring Paddle Billing subscriptions for Next.js App Router: signed webhooks sync subscription state into a Supabase 'subscriptions' table, plus an authenticated customer-portal endpoint. Separate from one-off 'payments' (Stripe). Requires Supabase Auth — selection auto-pins the supabase-auth dossier under 'auth' — plus a host-provided subscriptions table with a user_id column. Demo mode (mock: visual): plan/pricing UI renders fully and manage-subscription actions show the SubscriptionConfigNotice + 503 instead of touching Paddle — no fake billing.
summarySv: Återkommande prenumerationer och medlemskap via Paddle. Väljer du detta kopplas Supabase-inloggning in automatiskt (krävs för kundportalen). Utan riktiga nycklar visas planer och prenumerationsytan i demoläge med en tydlig notis — ingen debitering sker förrän Paddle är kopplat.

envVars.purpose: Supabase project URL for the server auth client (reads the signed-in user) and the admin write client (webhook upserts). Tagged 'feature-runtime': the routes return 503 'subscriptions-not-configured' when it is missing or a placeholder, so it never crashes the build.

Server-only Supabase service-role key used by webhook processing to upsert subscription rows. Never exposed to client code. Tagged 'feature-runtime': the admin client is lazy and the webhook route returns 503 when it is missing instead of failing the build.

Supabase anon key for the server-side auth client that reads the signed-in user in the customer-portal route. Tagged 'feature-runtime': the route returns 503 when it is missing or a placeholder instead of constructing a client with an invalid key.

Server-only Paddle API key used to verify webhooks via the Paddle SDK and create customer-portal sessions. Get it from Paddle developer tools for the matching environment. Tagged 'feature-runtime': the SDK is lazy-instantiated after the route's env guard, so a missing key degrades to 503, not a build crash.

Paddle notification destination secret used to verify the paddle-signature header against the raw webhook body. Get it from the Paddle webhook destination settings. Tagged 'feature-runtime': the webhook route returns 503 when it is missing instead of verifying with an empty secret.
Selects the Paddle SDK environment; set to 'production' for live billing, otherwise the helper defaults to 'sandbox'. Tagged 'warn-only': optional with a safe default.
